name: Loan For Any Purpose
description_short: Loan For Any Purpose at 5046 Crookshank Rd #6, Cincinnati, OH 45238 in the Westwood neighborhood is Mon-Fri 7:00 AM – 8:00 PM. Google reviewers rate the branch 4.9 stars across 10 reviews. Call +1 513-496-3994.
description_long:
Loan For Any Purpose is a consumer lending company with physical branch locations across multiple US states, including a Detroit location at 3403 Grand River Ave and a corporate address in Atlanta, GA. The company operates under the positioning that borrowers of all credit backgrounds can access financing, making it a destination for consumers who may have been turned away elsewhere. Their Detroit branch maintains extended weekday hours (7am–8pm) and weekend availability (9am–6pm), distinguishing it from standard banking hours.

The company offers a broad product stack spanning the full short-term lending spectrum. Products include cash advances for needs under $1,000, payday loans up to $1,000, same-day loans with minimal documentation, installment loans from $1,000–$5,000, title loans secured by a vehicle's title for up to $50,000, and traditional personal loans up to $50,000. The stated borrowing range is $250–$50,000. Most products are marketed to all credit types; personal loans are the exception, where a higher credit score is recommended.

What distinguishes Loan For Any Purpose is its single-lender breadth: a borrower can access everything from a $250 payday advance to a $50,000 vehicle-title loan at the same branch. The company explicitly does not perform a hard FICO inquiry on application — instead, it may pull from a non-traditional consumer reporting agency, which the lender discloses could appear on that agency's profile without affecting the FICO score. Applications can be submitted online or in person, and the company notes that online verification may add up to two business days to funding.

Honestly, the website lacks transparency on the most important consumer data points: no APR ranges, fee schedules, or representative examples are published. The disclaimer is explicit that these are short-term products not intended for ongoing financial needs, and the company recommends credit counseling for borrowers with chronic credit difficulties — a signal that many of its core products (payday, cash advance, title) carry costs that can compound. Consumers with a genuine choice should exhaust credit union PALs and CDFI products before turning here.
pros: Wide loan range from $250 to $50,000 accessible at a single lender
Most products (cash advance, payday, installment, title) accept all credit types including bad credit
Extended hours — Mon–Fri 7am–8pm and weekends 9am–6pm at the Detroit branch
Same-day loan option with minimal documentation required
Title loans allow borrowing up to $50,000 using vehicle as collateral
Applying does not affect your FICO score — uses a non-traditional credit bureau instead
Physical branch in Detroit with a direct local phone number for in-person assistance
cons: No APR, interest rate, or fee information published anywhere on the website
Personal loans — their largest unsecured product — require a higher credit score, restricting access for the bad-credit borrowers they primarily market to
Products are explicitly short-term and not designed for ongoing borrowing needs
Non-traditional credit bureau inquiry may appear on that agency's file, which borrowers may not anticipate
State availability and product terms vary, and specific eligibility requirements are not disclosed upfront
best_for: Detroit-area borrowers with bad or thin credit who need $250–$1,000 quickly
Vehicle owners who need access to larger amounts (up to $50,000) via a title-secured loan
Borrowers who prefer walking into a branch rather than applying purely online
People who need same-day or next-day cash and have already been declined by traditional banks
diagnosis: Loan For Any Purpose is best for borrowers in Detroit who need fast cash between $250 and $5,000 and cannot qualify at a bank or credit union — the physical branch, extended hours, and all-credit-welcome policy are genuine conveniences. The main caveat is significant: no rates or fees are disclosed on the website, and the product mix (payday, title, cash advance) typically carries high costs that make these loans expensive if not repaid quickly.
services: Cash advances (under $1,000, unsecured, all credit types)
Payday loans (up to $1,000, bad credit welcome)
Title loans (up to $50,000, secured by vehicle title)
Installment loans ($1,000–$5,000, unsecured, all credit types)
Personal loans (up to $50,000, unsecured, higher credit score recommended)
Bad credit loans (general category across multiple products)
In-person branch applications (Detroit and other locations)
Unsecured loan products (cash advance, installment, personal)
